title: EU Court greenlights France’s age-check rules for EU-based porn websites
summary_full: Under certain conditions, France's laws requiring porn websites to age-check their users fall under online child safety concerns
summary_public: Under certain conditions, France's laws requiring porn websites to age-check their users fall under online child safety concerns
